title: Heat Fragmented Genomic DNA for Illumina Library Preparation
author: Marie-Ka Tilak
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jxicpke

steps.instruction: Shearing DNA Shear (tube 0,2 ml) 500ng (10ng/ul) of extracted genomic in 200bp to 500bp using Ultrasonic cleaning unit fill in with 250ml of 4°C sterilized water for 20 min.
1/ DNA extraction Genomic DNA was extracted using DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit, according the manufacturer’s instructions.

3/ Denaturized fragmented DNA Preheat thermocycler to 90°C and heat the tube for 5 min. Without allowing the tube to cool, add 90ul (ratio volume fragmented DNA / volume beads was 1,8) Agencourt beads for sizing fragmented genomic DNA following Illumina library protocol. Elute in 32ul of ultra pure water. Be careful : at this step, the loss of DNA is about 60%. To obtain a higher amount of DNA, use several 500 ng samples rather than one of 1µg. Indeed, denaturation at 90 ° C is less effective with larger amounts of DNA

4/ Illumina library preparation 4-1/ Blunt-end repair Prepare the master mix for the required number of samples. Add 8 µl of master mix to each sample. Mix gently by pipetting. Incubate 15 min at 25°C, followed by 5 min at 12°C. %s %s Clean the samples: mix 64 µl of AMPure XP beads to each tube and follow the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 32 µl of ultra pure water. 4-2/ Adapter ligation Prepare the master mix for the required number of samples. Add 6 µl of master mix to each sample. Mix gently by pipetting. Incubate at 16°C overnight. %s %s Clean the samples: mix 64 µl of AMPure XP beads to each tube and follow the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 34 µl of ultra pure water. 4-3/ Fill in Prepare the master mix for the required number of samples. Add 6 µl of master mix to each sample. Mix gently by pipetting. Incubate 20 min at 37°C. %s %s Clean the samples: mix 64 µl of AMPure XP beads to each tube and follow the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 30 µl of ultra pure water.

5/Indexed PCR %s %s Cycling protocol for library amplification: 12 cycles %s %s Clean the samples: mix 80 µl of AMPure XP beads to each tube and follow the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute in 30 µl of ultra pure water.
Library quantification Libraries were quantified with Nanodrop ND-800 and pooled in equimolar ratio before Illumina sequencing.
